case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR VS. MICHELLE LA FLUE

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,104.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LA FLUE, MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DORAN GIN, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER FOR THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S OFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MICHELLE LA FLUE. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.50 - SERVED JUN-05-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LA FLUE, MICHELLE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LA FLUE, MICHELLE $3,104.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,149.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
